Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Return of the Obra Dinn: spherical mapped dithering for a 1bpp first-person game 208 upvotes, 29 comments
  2. Noq: n0's new QUIC implementation in Rust 130 upvotes, 17 comments
  3. The Shape of Inequalities 88 upvotes, 14 comments
  4. NanoGPT Slowrun: 10x Data Efficiency with Infinite Compute 78 upvotes, 13 comments
  5. From Oscilloscope to Wireshark: A UDP Story (2022) 66 upvotes, 12 comments
  6. Show HN: Three new Kitten TTS models – smallest less than 25MB 285 upvotes, 90 comments
  7. OpenBSD: PF queues break the 4 Gbps barrier 174 upvotes, 54 comments
  8. The Need for an Independent AI Grid 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  9. EsoLang-Bench: Evaluating Genuine Reasoning in LLMs via Esoteric Languages 45 upvotes, 13 comments
  10. Xiaomi launches next-gen SU7 with 902 km range and Lidar, still undercuts Tesla 50 upvotes, 17 comments
  11. Tesla: Failure of the FSD's degradation detection system [pdf] 141 upvotes, 62 comments
  12. macOS 26 breaks custom DNS settings including .internal 300 upvotes, 147 comments
  13. Astral to Join OpenAI 1158 upvotes, 716 comments
  14. Scaling Karpathy's Autoresearch: What Happens When the Agent Gets a GPU Cluster 104 upvotes, 51 comments
  15. “Your frustration is the product” 384 upvotes, 232 comments
  16. How the Turner twins are mythbusting modern technical apparel 74 upvotes, 36 comments
  17. Juggalo makeup blocks facial recognition technology (2019) 216 upvotes, 133 comments
  18. My Random Forest Was Mostly Learning Time-to-Expiry Noise 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  19. Cockpit is a web-based graphical interface for servers 121 upvotes, 73 comments
  20. Be intentional about how AI changes your codebase 37 upvotes, 18 comments
  21. Android developer verification: Balancing openness and choice with safety 17 upvotes, 6 comments
  22. Launch HN: Voltair (YC W26) – Drone and charging network for power utilities 43 upvotes, 23 comments
  23. An update on Steam / GOG changes for OpenTTD 244 upvotes, 179 comments
  24. Clockwise acquired by Salesforce and shutting down next week 47 upvotes, 32 comments
  25. Waymo Safety Impact 168 upvotes, 143 comments
  26. Connecticut and the 1 Kilometer Effect 35 upvotes, 24 comments
  27. Bombarding gamblers with offers greatly increases betting and gambling harm 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  28. Minecraft Source Code Is Interesting 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  29. Google details new 24-hour process to sideload unverified Android apps 402 upvotes, 458 comments
  30. 4Chan mocks £520k fine for UK online safety breaches 219 upvotes, 348 comments

Last generated 7:30am, 20 March 2026. Source here.
